app.title: Pirates
app.titleFull: Pirates – Pegya, Outlaw of the Pannonian Sea
app.subtitle: Pegya, the outlaw of Zenta
app.tagline: A flooded Pannonian basin, sail and gunpowder — with Hungarian heart.

career.name: Captain name
career.hint: Default: Pegya, the outlaw of Zenta

world.nearPort: Near {{port}} — tap the anchor to dock

tanya.title: The Zenta homestead
tanya.greeting: Anikó runs out to meet you, the two girls laughing by candlelight.
tanya.rested: You slept in a clean bed. +{{morale}} morale, +{{food}} food.
tanya.gaveGold: Tears well up in Anikó's eyes: "Thank you, Pegya."
tanya.notEnoughGold: You don't have that much gold.
tanya.playedWithGirls: An hour of hide-and-seek in the cornfield. Pegya's heart grows full. +{{fame}} fame.
tanya.letterIntro: "My dear Pegya! The girls asked about the water again today. Csillag learned a new song, Boróka watches over the cat. Take care of yourself — we wait for you." — Anikó

tavern.title: The Csárda
tavern.flavor: The innkeeper offers a bowl of paprika stew. A cimbalom plays by the hearth.

merchant.title: Merchant stall
merchant.subtitle: {{name}}'s wares, at {{port}}'s market
merchant.flavor: "I buy, I sell — never tobacco, always tobacco!" — Uncle Gyuri, the merchant

shipyard.title: Shipwright — Lőrinc Kovács's workshop
shipyard.subtitle: "A good ship is like a good wife: both need upkeep."
shipyard.patchDone: Ship patched. You can sail tomorrow.
shipyard.repaired: Ship is shipshape — gleams like Tisza water.

governor.title: The Ispán's palace
governor.ballInvite: His daughter invites you to dance…

naval.title: Water battle
naval.cryRally: Come on, lads! Zenta blood never runs like water!

land.title: City siege
land.victory: The town has fallen! Pegya's flag flies on the tower.
land.anikoLetter: "I knew you could do it. Come home. — Anikó"

tutorial.move: Tap anywhere on the water to sail there.
tutorial.wind: Small arrows show wind direction — into it you sail slower.
tutorial.port: Tap the anchor to dock at a port.
tutorial.combat: In combat positioning is everything: turn broadside to use your cannons.
tutorial.home: Zenta is your home — Anikó and the girls wait there. Visit often!

backstory.title: Pegya's Legend
backstory.paragraph1: Zenta, 1678. When the Creator flooded the Pannonian basin, the Tisza and Danube collapsed, and the hills of Bácska, Bánság, Szerémség, Szlavónia became islands. Pegya was a fisherman on the Zenta ridge, Anikó the miller's daughter. Raiding Ottoman troops torched the farm one night — Pegya defended his family.
backstory.paragraph2: They boarded a ship bound for the unknown. The Pannonian Sea is treacherous, and the shallow waters between the ridges are unpredictable. They drifted for months, and two daughters were born along the way: Csillag, whose eyes shine like the night sky, and Boróka, as stubborn as a juniper tree.
backstory.paragraph3: Pegya signed on as a sailor under a Swabian captain, but the captain cheated him out of his wages. On a stormy night, Pegya took over the ship and raised his own flag: red, blue, and yellow bands, with a sunflower at the center. No one on the Pannonian Sea dares cross the outlaw of Zenta anymore.
backstory.paragraph4: Anikó and the girls wait on the Zenta island — the loess ridge where his father fished, now a small island in the water. From here Pegya sails to every adventure, and returns after every battle. This is his story.

szeged.flavor: The northern water-border. Paprika, fishing boats, a market where everyone haggles.

szabadka.flavor: The heart of Bácska — big market, bigger tongue. Gate of Bácska.

magyarkanizsa.flavor: Tisza fishermen and salt baths. Sailors heal here.

zenta.flavor: Pegya's home. Anikó cooks paprikás, Csillag and Boróka play in the cornfield.

topolya.flavor: Hemp fields and vineyards — the old man plays the cimbalom under the poplar.

obecse.flavor: Óbecse, a big port — cargo of wheat, honey, Hungarian stubbornness.

baja.flavor: Fish-stew town. Bunyevci sell hemp rope and linen.

zombor.flavor: Bunyevac ispán's palace. Catholic church spire above the water.

apatin.flavor: Swabian-built shipyard — cheapest repair on the sea.

hodsag.flavor: Small Swabian town — bread and wine like in Bavaria.

verbasz.flavor: Swabian linen weavers. The women are stricter than the captains.

nagybecskerek.flavor: Swabian capital of Bánság. Cannon foundry, raw materials trade.

kikinda.flavor: Swabian mills, grain warehouses. They load up for Vienna here.

eszek.flavor: Slavonia's Swabian fortress city. Commander of commanders.

kishegyes.flavor: Slovak village on the Bácska ridge. Plum brandy, mountain tales.

petroc.flavor: Slovak Lutheran weaving house — finest linen around.

vukovar.flavor: Szerémség Serb town. Sentinel of the Drava mouth.

ujvidek.flavor: Seat of the Serb bishopric — and the grand bazaar overlooking the water.

petervarad.flavor: Pétervárad's rock fortress — earthly paradise of the Serbs. Cannons everywhere.

karloca.flavor: Home of the Serbian patriarchate. Monasteries and conspiracies.

titel.flavor: Montenegrin (crnagorac) pirate haven above the Tisza mouth. No one asks where you came from.

temesvar.flavor: Banat's Romanian capital. Rich, proud, thick-walled.

lugos.flavor: Romanian small town, at the foot of silver mines. Heavy weapons.

versec.flavor: Romanian wine country — cellars hold more stories than corks.

fehertemplom.flavor: Banat's southern tip. White walls, black hearts.

szalankemen.flavor: Ottoman border fort. Watches over the Tisza-Danube mouth.

pancsova.flavor: Ottoman port — the sultan's caravan buys powder here.

zimony.flavor: Zimony — the Sava-Danube mouth. Ottoman customs, heavy taxes.

nandorfehervar.flavor: Nándorfehérvár — the southern border fortress, under the crescent. Memory of heroic Hunyadi.
